title: VR Ultimate
description: Immersive Vanilla-like VR Modpack with improved performance and VR friendly Quality of Life features.
body:
## Quality of Life Features
The modpack introduces several features that streamline your gameplay and make tasks more efficient. Enjoy the convenience of **Veinmining**, where you can mine entire ore veins with a single swing, and **Timber**, which allows you to chop down entire trees in one hit. These features eliminate the repetitive aspects of gathering resources and help you focus more on the creative and exploratory side of your VR world.

![chopping down tree](https://media3.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExZWd6cWs2cTM1Ym1semF5enBoZmg2eThxMXBwczBnYmJ0am04MHl6MSZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/unQdOtUViU3CI78Ue7/giphy.gif)

![mining ore](https://media4.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExc2t1NnBhamEycGh5aWtkdjB3bGgzeGQxenVzM2V4ZXV5anhjMXZyZiZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/9VZVlB6TzXXl5DrdW7/giphy.gif)

## Enhanced Performance
Optimized for a smooth and responsive experience, this modpack includes strong performance enhancements that ensure your VR session stays fluid, even on lower-end systems. Whether you're exploring vast landscapes or engaging in intense building projects, the performance improvements reduce lag and increase overall stability, making your gameplay more enjoyable.

## Texture Packs
The modpack includes several optional 3D texture packs that add depth and realism to your environment. Each block and object is carefully designed to look more lifelike, creating a visually rich world that feels real and immersive. The additional immersive resource packs further enhance the visual quality, making every detail stand out with sharp textures and rich color while maintaining a Vanilla look.

![looking around](https://media0.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExc2V0NjBhOW1ycmVtcW15ZjVocjV6cmYzMGo1YnJoZDlreXg2MTZoYiZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/bXlAjFtjvJHczlj5Bz/giphy.gif)

## Shaders
With Complementary Shaders, your VR world will come alive with stunning lighting, realistic shadows, and beautiful water effects. This visual upgrade adds dynamic elements such as soft sun rays filtering through trees and realistic reflections, making the environment feel more authentic and engaging.
